name: pesquisaPorMes
code:
SELECT SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 7) AS name, ROUND(AVG(P.VALOR), 1) AS value, COUNT(*) AS total FROM PESQUISAS P WHERE ('{{mes}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 7) = '{{mes}}') AND P.DATA_RESPOSTA != ''
AND ('{{dataInicio}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 10) >= '{{dataInicio}}')
AND ('{{dataFim}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 10) <= '{{dataFim}}')
GROUP BY name ORDER BY name
